content.title: AI Market Report March 2026: What 100 Upwork Jobs Reveal
content.hook_text: 68% of AI jobs aren't building AI — they're integrating it

content.title: AI Automation Dominates at 52%
content.description: n8n, Make.com & voice agents (Vapi/Retell) are the top demand — avg $518/project

content.title: $5,700 TikTok Pipeline = 30+ hrs/week saved
content.description: Fully automated: product input → AI video → auto-post. Pays for itself in 4 weeks

content.title: Voice AI Is the Biggest Gap
content.description: Vapi & Retell demand is exploding but specialist supply is nearly zero — $500-$2,000/agent

content.title: Agentic Systems Command $1,500–$5,000+
content.description: Clients want multi-step AI agents that research, decide & act — not just single automations

content.title: Content Factories > Content Creators
content.description: End-to-end AI pipelines for TikTok, LinkedIn & Instagram: $2,000–$6,000 build + $500/mo retainer
